violations.text: Inspector observed food items stored in plastic grocery bags in the freezer units. PIC informed to use food grade bags. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Various food items in buckets were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Inspector observed raw frozen chicken in freezer chest, which was unprotected. PIC informed to wrap or place frozen chicken in a food grade plastic bag or container. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
